scope: Superseding audit for the current LifeMax public browser-local demo checkpoint after the plan-editor, local-export, local-day-review, experiment-observation, midday-rescue, and quick-restart repairs.
active_goal: Continue the LifeMax high-functionality goal: inspect current repo/proof/deployed preview, verify live navigation and local-demo flows, repair the highest-impact functionality/UI gaps, rerun quality gates, update durable proof, and deploy safely as far as approved.

verdict.reason: The visible public demo now has stateful local flows, real Profile export controls, a local day-review checkpoint, and a repaired mobile shell, but backend/shared-context/Wave 1 readiness remains red or unproved.

current_git_and_deploy_state.latest_code_commit_subject: feat: add local quick restart flow
current_git_and_deploy_state.preview_status: ready in Vercel CLI but not treated as public proof because prior previews were blocked by Vercel login protection

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Navigation across Today, Capture, Patterns, Experiments, Profile, and Privacy

acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: Top bar, desktop side navigation, Profile controls, and route smoke all reach /privacy.
Manual check-in, editable plan, plan item statuses, evening close, refresh persistence, and plan-editor sync were tested locally and on omega.
Capture kind, label, note, impact save, and list visibility were covered by Playwright smoke and production proof.

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Patterns or Experiments derive from user actions
acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: Pattern watch decision, experiment start/inconclusive flow, and the new Local day review checkpoint were part of local and production smoke.

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Patterns show higher-level synthesis instead of only cards/buttons
acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: reports/lifemax-day-review-proof-2026-06-20.json records day-review derivation, save/update review checkpoint, Profile Review saved status, export reviewed_at, and live smoke on both production aliases.

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Local persistence across refresh when backend unavailable
acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: Today plan/editor state and local demo flow were refreshed and verified after storage hydration.

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Profile/privacy data controls are real and honest
acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: reports/lifemax-local-export-proof-2026-06-20.json records real JSON download, structured export preview, status messaging, and local-only boundary.

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Desktop and mobile inspected without overflow
acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: Local and omega mobile/desktop smokes reported no horizontal overflow; screenshots exist as local ignored artifacts under reports/screenshots/.
LifeMax lab boot packet remains red and safe_to_claim_daily_usable is false; WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, and backend writes are explicitly unconnected.

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Midday Rescue visible, stateful, and honest
acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: reports/lifemax-midday-rescue-proof-2026-06-20.json records the saved rescue workflow, refresh persistence, Profile/export visibility, Privacy copy, production smoke on both aliases, and screenshots.

acceptance_criteria_proof.criterion: Missed-day Quick Restart visible, stateful, and honest
acceptance_criteria_proof.evidence: reports/lifemax-quick-restart-proof-2026-06-20.json records the restart workflow, conservative plan/check-in creation, refresh persistence, Profile/export visibility, Privacy copy, production smoke on both aliases, and screenshots.

commands_and_results: npm run test: pass, 3 files and 10 tests
npm run test:fixtures: pass, 1 file and 2 tests
npm run test:pwa: pass, 1 file and 1 test
npm run build && npm run screenshot:mobile: pass after sequential rerun; includes day-review checkpoint and mobile width regression
npx --yes vercel deploy --prod -y: READY linked-project production after explicit approval
npx --yes vercel inspect life-max-omega.vercel.app: READY production alias
npm run screenshot:mobile: pass after stale rescue/close draft hydration repair; includes rescue refresh-value assertions
npx --yes vercel inspect life-max-omega.vercel.app and lifemax-web.vercel.app: READY production aliases after Midday Rescue deploy
npm run screenshot:mobile: fail then pass after quick-restart selector and lowered-intensity assertion repairs
npx --yes vercel inspect life-max-omega.vercel.app and lifemax-web.vercel.app: READY production aliases after Quick Restart deploy

key_findings: Quick Restart is real enough on live omega and lifemax-web: save, refresh persistence, Profile/export preview, Privacy reachability, mobile width, and no serious browser errors were independently smoked.
Repo checks were independently rerun: typecheck, lint, tests, fixtures, PWA, build, git diff --check, and no-secrets scan.
The broader omega flow was also live-smoked by the verifier: Today, Midday Rescue, Evening Close, Capture, Patterns review, Experiment observation, mobile/desktop width, and no runtime errors.
The goal must remain active because broader shared-context readiness is not complete.

defects_repaired_this_cycle: Plan editor and summary could disagree after localStorage hydration; repaired and deployed in commit 1fa968c.
Profile export/data controls were explanatory but not functionally exportable; repaired and deployed in commit 8865829.
Patterns lacked a day-level review synthesis after the full local loop; repaired and deployed in commit ba63df1.
Mobile content was squeezed by a hidden desktop side-nav column; repaired and covered by a width regression in commit ba63df1.
Main proof packet had stale preview-only production wording; refreshed in this checkpoint proof commit.
Today lacked the documented Midday Rescue workflow; repaired and deployed in commit db6dfd2.
Saved rescue/evening-close panels could display stale draft fields after refresh; repaired with persisted-state keys and Playwright assertions in commit db6dfd2.
Today lacked the Wave 2 missed-day Quick Restart workflow; repaired and deployed in commit 718468d.
Quick Restart introduced ambiguous command/status selectors; repaired with explicit accessible labels and assertions in commit 718468d.
residual_risks: This is still a browser-local demo, not full LifeMax dogfood readiness.
Preview URLs are not treated as public proof because of Vercel login protection history.
Screenshots are local ignored artifacts and not included in git.
Clipboard copy is implemented but download is the primary browser-smoked export path.
The lab repo/shared-context boot path remains red, so daily-use, wellness-intensity, or integration readiness cannot be claimed.
Midday Rescue is local-only and does not send reminders or backend writes.
Full LifeMax shared-context readiness remains red/unproved after this checkpoint.
Quick Restart is local-only and does not send reminders or backend writes.
stop_continue_decision: Stop this run at a checkpoint after verifier/proof commit unless Oliver asks for another implementation cycle. Continue the active goal with either another Wave 2 local workflow improvement or the approval-gated shared-context/backend repair path.
